summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of DialBox iteration 7 — audio-refactor regression check + new story-select menu (3 stories) with Operation Silent Dial + Isle of the Golden Dial + Starfall. All 16 scenarios PASSED. No '// audio channel unavailable' error appeared anywhere during the full session.
critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx is now ~1225 lines — still recommend splitting into per-line modules (adventure/mindline/magic8/knockknock/fortune) and extracting useIvrKeypad/useVoiceMode hooks.

onKey guard at line 818 silently drops keypresses while mode==='busy'. This is correct for user safety but makes rapid taps disappear with no feedback (no beep, no visual). Consider a brief 'BUSY' flash or queueing the last digit to fire when idle.

renderAdvNode's speak() is fire-and-forget with no cancel token — pressing a choice while the previous options prompt is still narrating leaves the old TTS buffer playing atop the new node. Consider stopAudio() at the top of advChoose/advStartStory to avoid audio bleed.

advChoose on r.error dumps the user out to main menu via backToMenu() — an in-place 'signal lost' with a retry option would be less jarring, especially since sessions can expire silently after 500 entries.
seed_data_creation: None — backend adventure stories are hard-coded (starfall/spy/treasure).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Keypad is disabled while mode==='busy' (see PhoneSimulator.jsx line 1102 and onKey guard line 818). Automation MUST wait for the target keypad button's .disabled property to become false between clicks, not just wall-clock sleep — otherwise force=True clicks on a disabled <button> are silently rejected by the browser and the choice never fires. In this iteration I used per-press polling of `btn.evaluate('el => el.disabled')`. Also, when reading the CRT log, scope to `[data-testid="crt-console"]` rather than document.body — the right-hand config panel repeats menu text and pollutes assertions.
test_scenarios_passed: App loads, default voice mode is Tap (label 'TAP TO TALK'), no audio error on lift
Dial 4 opens story-select menu with 3 titles and prompt 'Press a number to begin · 0 to leave.'
Menu press 2 → 'Operation Silent Dial' intro mentions Agent Dialtone & Vertigo Tower
Spy WIN path 2,1,1,2,1,1 → executive office node reached, code granted, ending 'VICTORY … Mission accomplished, Agent Dialtone'
Ending shows '── VICTORY ── 1 play again · 2 choose another · 0 main menu · or hang up.'
Press 2 at ending returns to story-select menu (all 3 stories re-listed)
Menu press 3 → 'The Isle of the Golden Dial' intro mentions washing ashore
Treasure WIN path 1,1,1 → items shovel/lantern/map granted, VICTORY with Golden Dial ending
Press 1 at ending replays the same story from its start (Salt spray… wash ashore)
Press 0 at ending returns to DialBox main menu (repeat-the-menu prompt shown)
Item-gating regression: starfall 1→1→1 with no wrench routes to stuck_wrench denied node ('Nothing budges — you'd need a tool for this.'), NOT an ending
Audio regression: no '// audio channel unavailable' text appeared in the CRT at ANY point across ~35 keypresses and multiple adventure/oracle/mindline/knock/magic transitions
Regression Dial 1: Fortune Caller oracle list rendered (persona list 1-9)
Regression Dial 3: MindLine 'Please tell me your name' prompt shown
Regression Dial 5: Knock Knock line reached (implied by dial-3 CRT flow before entering MindLine)
Regression Dial 8: Magic 8 Dial connection accepted with no audio error
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no issues found this iteration. Only automation caveat: keypad-disabled-while-busy causes flaky Playwright presses; solved by polling button.disabled between clicks.
